---
title: "Gathering What's Already Known"
subtitle: "Search before you generate"
---

*Draft pending — placeholder for the gate-sequence rebuild.*

**Planned:** compresses the six source chapters (public, private, customer, competitor signals, experts, internal/accounting) into one narrative chapter plus the method-layer checklist. The under-search guard: exhaust what already exists before you spend to generate new signal. (Source drafts are parked in *Holding* below.)
